name: steamwebbot
description: Local web app to look up Steam profile info: hours, level, owned games, recent activity, bans, friends.

scripts.build:loader-exe: node scripts/stopGalaxyLoaderPkgExe.js && pkg loader/loader.js --targets node20-win-x64 --output dist/GalaxyLoader.exe --public
scripts.build:galaxy-gui: npm install --prefix galaxy-desktop --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build --prefix galaxy-desktop
